_comment: operon-plugin hooks. PreToolUse fires pretooluse-wrapper -> pretooluse.py. Two responsibilities branch on tool_name inside the script: (a) Bash|Edit|Write|MultiEdit|NotebookEdit -> guardrail-rule evaluation against operon_mcp_server.rules (deny/warn/log + audit log); (b) Agent -> WA1 transcript replay (v2.9 section 5.1) -- mutates tool_input.prompt to prepend prior sidechain transcripts so a re-spawned teammate gets first-person recall. WA1 fails open on any error and does NOT write to guardrail_log.jsonl. Land 4 removed the Stop hook block; Land 5 added Agent to the matcher.
